description_long: This is a rugged, single-bladed axe featuring a weathered wooden handle and a robust, metallic head. The handle is slightly curved with visible grain and texture, suggesting it is crafted from solid wood, and it is reinforced with a leather or fabric wrap near the head for added grip and durability. The axe head is made of steel, showing signs of wear and a matte, rough finish, with a broad cutting edge and a squared poll on the opposite side. The blade is securely mounted to the handle with visible crosswise bindings, likely for extra stability. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for chopping wood or as a tool in urban maintenance or emergency scenarios. There is a faint marking or engraving on the handle, adding a touch of character to the otherwise functional appearance.
description: A sturdy, weathered axe with a wooden handle and a steel blade, reinforced with crosswise bindings and a textured grip. The design is practical and robust, ideal for chopping or utility work.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a side angle, highlighting the broad steel blade, the curved wooden handle, and the crosswise bindings near the head.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the narrow profile of the blade and the handle, emphasizing the thickness and alignment of the axe head.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the other face of the blade and handle, with visible wear and the same crosswise bindings.
description_view_3: A rear view shows the back of the axe head (poll) and the full length of the handle, with the bindings and grip details visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, reinforced with a leather or fabric wrap near the head, oval cross-section, ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad steel blade with a slightly curved edge, squared poll, and visible wear; no beard, functional and utilitarian.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with crosswise bindings for reinforcement.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: faint engraving or marking on the handle
